> `const` **MapInterceptor**: \<`TSource`, `TDestination`\>(`from`, `to`, `options?`) => `Type`\<`NestInterceptor`\>

Defined in: [packages/nestjs/src/lib/map.interceptor.ts:29](https://github.com/nartc/mapper/blob/main/packages/nestjs/src/lib/map.interceptor.ts#L29)

Maps route-handler responses with synchronous or asynchronous mappings.
Promise-returning member resolvers and callbacks are awaited before the
response is emitted, and mapping errors propagate through the response stream.

## Type Parameters

### TSource

`TSource` *extends* `Dictionary`\<`TSource`\>

### TDestination
